# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: '2021-02-01'
    name: myFunctionApp
    location: [location]
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/resourceGroups/[resourceGroupName]/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/[serverfarmName]'
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: '[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '/', guid(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'storage')))]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ba92f5b4-26d3-42f9-8c07-d0e7e70cc291'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]'

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: '[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '/', guid(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'keyvault')))]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/f71e86a6-4d3c-4913-ba35-f2c02bfbba04'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]'

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: '[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '/', guid(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'sql')))]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c7f8f50c-4b3d-4e4d-9207-b1ca6a8bfa4f'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]'

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: '[concat(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '/', guid(uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, 'cosmosdb')))]'
    dependsOn:
      - '[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/[subscriptionId]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/fbdf93bf-e0d1-487c-b82b-43576b487e14'
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]'
